center.name: 南阿拉伯
center.summary: 南阿拉伯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Dusky turtle dove，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dusky turtle dove is found in East Africa and South Arabia: Eritrea, Somalia, southern Sudan, Ethiopia, Uganda, Tanzania, Malawi, Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Yemen (disjunctive population), and southern Saudi Arabia (disjunctive population)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The dusky turtle dove is found in East Africa and South Arabia: Eritrea, Somalia, southern Sudan, Ethiopia, Uganda, Tanzania, Malawi, Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Yemen (disjunctive population), and southern Saudi Arabia (disjunctive population)
